events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario is about spool erection & fit-up in piping, with a wrong root gap observed. This is a non-compliant condition per ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings. Root gap is critical for proper weld penetration and quality. Wrong root gap means the fit-up is defective and needs rework before welding proceeds.

Decision: fail (non-compliant)
Risk: high (wrong root gap can lead to weld defects, failures)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 70-80% for rough-complete fit-up
Value: 0 (not asked for specific numeric reading, but root gap is wrong)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: wrong root gap in spool fit-up
Actions: rework fit-up to correct root gap per WPS/iso
References: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings
